parameters.toolDescription: Search prior FortisAI Gmail and AOL spam decisions stored in Qdrant to help classify similar emails.

options.systemMessage: You are an email spam classifier. You MUST call the Qdrant Memory Tool for every email before deciding. Be conservative: classify as SPAM only when it is more likely than not. Return ONLY JSON: {"verdict":"SPAM|NOT_SPAM","reason":"short reason","memory_used":true|false}. No markdown, no extra text.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { account_id: $json.account_id || $json.routeMailbox, source_folder: $json.sourceFolder || 'Inbox', target_folder: 'Spam', uid: String($json.imapUid || $json.uid || ''), message_id: String($json.rfcMessageId || $json.sourceMessageId || $json.messageId || ''), expunge: true } }}

nodes.name: Move AOL Spam to Spam Folder
Build AOL Spam Folder Memory Records

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const source = $('Build AOL Spam Folder Memory Records').item.json || $json; return { account_id: source.account_id || source.routeMailbox, source_folder: source.sourceFolder || 'Spam', uid: String(source.imapUid || source.uid || ''), message_id: String(source.rfcMessageId || source.sourceMessageId || source.messageId || ''), expunge: true }; })() }}
